title: campanula pilosa var. dasyantha
intro: Campanula pilosa var. dasyantha, also known as the hairy bellflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Campanula pilosa var. dasyantha include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
